01

About

I'm drawn to the unglamorous middle of AI systems — the ingestion pipeline, the chunking strategy, the retrieval step nobody notices until it's wrong. During my internship at Can Tho University Software Center (CUSC), that's exactly where I spent my time: turning a folder of admissions PDFs and scanned forms into a chatbot that actually answers questions correctly, not just plausibly.

Outside of internship work, I go looking for problems where a graph is the honest way to model the data — predicting drug side effects from protein interaction networks, classifying sleep stages from raw physiological signals. I'd rather spend a week getting the data representation right than ship something that looks good in a demo and falls apart on real input.

I'm a final-year Information Technology student at Can Tho University (GPA 3.40/4.0), and I'm now looking for a full-time role in AI engineering, backend development, or applied ML where I can keep building systems like this.

BLUNI AI Chatbot

tuyensinh.blu.edu.vn ↗ Python · FastAPI · LangChain · RAG · OCR · Vector DB

Context Prospective students needed accurate answers about admissions, buried across scattered PDFs, Word docs, and scanned forms — the kind of thing that's slow to search and easy to get wrong.

Built An end-to-end RAG pipeline: OCR preprocessing for scanned pages, document chunking with metadata classification, multilingual embeddings, and semantic retrieval through a vector database — served via a FastAPI backend to the production frontend.

Why it matters The chatbot is live at tuyensinh.blu.edu.vn, turning static admissions paperwork into something a prospective student can just ask.

Autobot Trading Platform

React · Node.js · Express.js · MySQL

Context An automated trading platform needed backend infrastructure that traders could rely on for accounts, packages, and live signals.

Built RESTful APIs, authentication and account management, and dashboard modules covering package management, transaction history, and trading signals, working directly within a React / Node.js / MySQL stack.

Why it matters Shipped features traders used daily to track accounts and signals, while collaborating with the team on testing, debugging, and performance.

03

Projects

research & personal builds

Sleep AI — Sleep Stage Classification

repo ↗
Research project · team of 5
  • Researched applying AI to automated sleep analysis
  • Collected and preprocessed raw sleep datasets
  • Developed deep learning models for sleep stage classification
  • Evaluated performance with classification metrics

Sleep staging is normally hand-scored by clinicians overnight — this project tested how reliably a model could do it instead, validated against real classification metrics rather than a demo.

PythonDeep LearningTensorFlow / PyTorch

Drug Data Analysis System

repo ↗
Personal project
  • Built a Graph Neural Network to predict drug side effects
  • Constructed heterogeneous biomedical graphs from drug, protein, and side-effect data
  • Processed large-scale biomedical datasets for training
  • Evaluated with ROC-AUC, Precision-Recall, and F1-score

Catching side effects earlier is a real problem in drug research — modeling drugs, proteins, and side effects as one heterogeneous graph instead of flat features is what makes GraphSAGE useful here.

TensorFlowGraphSAGESpektralSTITCHSIDER
